mapper.select: SELECT ch.id AS chapter_id, ch.title AS chapter_title, ch.sort AS chapter_sort, ch.create_time AS chapter_create_time, s.id AS section_id, s.title AS section_title, s.video_url AS section_video_url, s.duration AS section_duration, s.is_free AS section_is_free, s.sort AS section_sort, s.create_time AS section_create_time FROM chapters ch LEFT JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE ch.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY ch.sort, s.sort
SELECT id, chapter_id, title, video_url, duration, is_free, sort, create_time FROM sections WHERE id = #{sectionId}
SELECT position, finished, last_learn_time FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_progress (user_id, course_id, section_id, position, finished, last_learn_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{position}, #{finished}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_progress SET position = #{position}, finished = #{finished}, last_learn_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM learning_progress lp INNER JOIN chapters ch ON lp.course_id = ch.course_id INNER JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} AND lp.course_id = #{courseId} AND lp.section_id = s.id AND lp.finished = 1
SELECT section_id FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY last_learn_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ch.course_id FROM chapters ch INNER JOIN sections s ON s.chapter_id = ch.id WHERE s.id = #{sectionId}
